name: mermaid-er-generator-web
description: A web-based Mermaid ER diagram generator with SQL DDL input

scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ../tests && npm install

author: luoleyan
